chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1678 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08.10.2025 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Malano, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with DSR Mehboob, Legal Officer, Pakistan Rangers, Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served, as the alleged detenue, namely Syed Zaki Mustafa Zaidi has been surfaced and is present before the Court, therefore, under instructions, he does not press instant Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
